name: Baked Beans, Boston Style
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups dried navy or kidney beans, soaked
2 medium onions, chopped into large pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 300 degrees.
2. Drain the beans and cover with fresh water. Bring to a boil for 5 minutes, then drain again.
3. Whisk together the molasses, brown sugar, mustard, cayenne, Bakon yeast, and tamari in a bowl.
4. Mix with the beans and add the chopped onions, bay leaves, garlic, salt, and pepper.
5. Place in a bean pot or 2-quart baking dish and add water to cover the beans.
6. Cover and bake until the beans are very soft, 7 to 8 hours. Check periodically and add more water if needed to keep the beans from drying out.
7. Remove the cover during the last half hour of cooking so a crust can form.
Note: 401 calories, 1.7 gram fat per 1 cup serving.
